// PROJECT · 01 · ACADEMIC DESIGN
Office Design
for Architect
Belvedere Rd, Matheran, Maharashtra
SPEC SHEET
Site Area320 sq·m — GF + FF TypeCommercial Office ConceptAbstract Art & Geometric Composition SoftwareAutoCAD · SketchUp · Lumion

Inspired by abstract art and geometric composition — lines arising from one particular form. The Cubist language translates into structural geometry composing spaces along angular flows. A brick-and-timber facade anchors the building to its hillside context while interior light wells provide dramatic daylight to the open-plan workspace below.

// PROJECT · 02 · ACADEMIC DESIGN
Residence Design
for Artist
Near Aswali Dam, Boardi, Maharashtra
SPEC SHEET
Site Area420 sq·m — GF + FF TypePrivate Residence ConceptCubist Painting → Angular Composition SoftwareAutoCAD · 3DS Max · Lumion

Drawing formal language from Cubist painting — abstract forms extracted and spaces divided from angular lines, generating rooms from one bold gesture. Natural stone cladding and exposed timber reference the lakeside landscape. Seven interior renders showcase the loft studio, master suite, courtyard, kitchen and bathroom — each with distinct materiality reflecting the artist-client’s practice.

Site Area40,000 sq·m TypePublic Agricultural College ProgramClassrooms · Labs · Hostel · Farms SoftwareAutoCAD · Revit · Lumion · 3DS Max

A 40,000 sqm institutional design exploring space connection, passive cooling, and vernacular construction. Colonnaded walkways, shaded outdoor corridors, and courtyard farming zones emerge from a modular brick-and-concrete grid. Nine rendered views demonstrate the scale and material richness of this large-scale public project.

// PROJECT · 05 · RSP FIELDWORK · 2018
RSP — Ganga Ghat
Varanasi
Lalita Ghat · Lalit Akhara · Nepalese Temple

Heritage documentation of the Ganga Ghats — measured survey of Lalita Ghat complex, Lalita Gauri Temple, and the historic Nepalese Temple. Full drawings including floor plans, roof plan, sections, elevations, and all ornamental details. Explores geography, culture, religious belief, and construction techniques of historic North Indian temple typologies.

Measured DrawingsTemple DocsHeritage SurveyGhat Analysis
// PROJECT · 06 · RSP FIELDWORK · 2020
RSP — Old Town
Jaipur
Jaimini House, Chandpole — 300-Year Haveli

Documentation of the 300-year-old Jaimini House — a Haveli built by the Jaipur royal family. Complete survey: ground through third floor plans at 1:400, front elevation, courtyard folded elevation, section A-A, and detailed drawings of traditional arches and carved wooden doors. Kota stone flooring and vernacular masonry techniques fully recorded on site.
